title: Qatar, a Dynasty with Global Ambitions
original_title: Qatar, une dynastie à la conquête du monde
overview: For three decades now, Qatar, this small desert kingdom, has not stopped being talked about; because of its financial power and the secrecy that surrounds it, the royal family that runs it fascinates as much as it frightens.
